query: Generally, a 5-year-old avocado tree produces 50 fruits, a 6-year-old one produces 3 times the initial amount of fruits, a 7-year-old one produces 7 times the initial amount, and an 8-year-old produces 200 fruits less than a 10-year-old one. During the ninth year, the avocado tree doesn't produce any fruit, and then a 10-year-old tree produces 20 times the initial amount of fruits. How many total fruits can an avocado tree produce during its 10 years of life?

nodes.task: Calculate the number of fruits produced by a 6-year-old avocado tree by multiplying the initial_amount by 3.
Calculate the number of fruits produced by a 7-year-old avocado tree by multiplying the initial_amount by 7.
Calculate the number of fruits produced by a 10-year-old avocado tree by multiplying the initial_amount by 20.
Calculate the number of fruits produced by an 8-year-old avocado tree by subtracting 200 from fruits_10_year_old.
Calculate partial_sum_1 by adding initial_amount and fruits_6_year_old.
Calculate partial_sum_2 by summing fruits_7_year_old, fruits_8_year_old, and fruits_10_year_old.
